target.name: Astera Labs
target.founder: Jitendra Mohan, Sanjay Gajendra, Casey Morrison

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 3 same-sector + same-stage peers in Chips & Semiconductors. Range: $1.0B - $5.0B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Semiconductors P/S median is 22.3x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

private.name: Credo Semiconductor
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Public), post-money $5B+

private.name: Ouster
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Public), post-money $1.5B

private.name: Aeva Technologies
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Public), post-money $1B+

data.narrative:
Astera Labs is a publicly traded semiconductor company founded by Jitendra Mohan, Sanjay Gajendra, and Casey Morrison. The valuation analysis draws from a comp universe of 3 public peers in Chips & Semiconductors (Credo Semiconductor, Ouster, and Aeva Technologies) alongside 8 private frontier-tech peers including Cerebras and PsiQuantum.

The peer-median method is the applicable triangulation approach here. Across the 3 same-sector, same-stage public comparables, the median valuation stands at $1.5B, with a range spanning $1.0B (Aeva Technologies) to $5.0B (Credo Semiconductor). A public-comp anchoring approach using price-to-sales multiples—where the semiconductor sector median is 22.3x across ALAB, NVDA, and AMD—cannot be applied due to the absence of disclosed revenue figures.

The triangulated valuation range is $1.3B to $1.7B, with a median implied value of $1.5B. This range reflects limited methodological depth given the single applicable approach and the wide dispersion within the peer set ($1.0B–$5.0B). Key uncertainties include the composition and stability of the peer group—particularly the outsized influence of Credo at $5.0B—and the lack of revenue or profitability data to anchor relative valuation multiples. Additional financial metrics would strengthen conviction in this range.
